title: Union with an `any` arm (collapses to any)
description: mion union.spec.ts 'support union with any type' — tsgo collapses `T | any` to `any`, so any value passes (the validator is effectively a no-op true).
notes: `T | any` collapses to `any` at the type-checker layer — the validator becomes a no-op that always returns true. `T | unknown` behaves the same way. If you want a real fallback that still narrows, use a concrete sibling type.
